FROM: data-processing-agent
TO: worker-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Execute the following sequential steps: (1) Download dataset from data lake, (2) Clean dataset by removing null rows, (3) Upload cleaned dataset to warehouse.

FROM: deployment-agent
TO: cluster-manager
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Execute three health checks simultaneously: check CPU usage, check memory usage, and check disk space.

FROM: routing-agent
TO: handler-agent
TYPE: inform
CONTENT: Process incoming request via primary-api-endpoint if available; route to fallback-cache-service on primary unavailability.

FROM: orchestrator
TO: pipeline-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Execute pipeline: (1) validate input schema, (2) run sentiment-analysis and topic-classification in parallel on validated data, (3) merge results into unified report.

FROM: query-agent
TO: data-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: REQ(@query-agent>@data-agent): if(cache_available($query), cache_fetch($query), (db_query($query) & cache_update($query)))

FROM: security-agent
TO: audit-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Execute simultaneous scan operations: (1) identify all open ports, (2) validate SSL certificates for each open port. Scope constraint: exclude all services marked as internal-only from both operations.

```
REQ(@etl_orchestrator>@pipeline): etl_execute(
  msg_id="ETL-20260301-001",
  protocol_version="0.1",
  task=sequence(
    parallel_extract(api_source(), db_source()),
    transform_validate(validate_schema(), validate_rules()),
    route_conditional(
      condition=validation_passed(),
      on_success=load(data_warehouse),
      on_failure=route(error_queue)
    )
  )
)
```

Both options require the following sequential workflow: (1) confirm inventory availability, (2) ship to warehouse and send invoice simultaneously, (3) await payment confirmation. Pricing reflects current market rates for comparable products in this category.

TO: worker

TO: cluster-manager

FROM: routing-agent
TO: handler-agent
TYPE: inform
CONTENT: Process the incoming request using the primary API endpoint if available; fall back to the cache service if the primary endpoint is unavailable.

REQ(@orchestrator>@pipeline): run_pipeline(
  validate($input_schema),
  parallel(
    sentiment_analysis($validated_data),
    topic_classification($validated_data)
  ),
  merge_report($sentiment_results, $topic_results)
)

FROM: query-agent
TO: data-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Fetch results for the query. Check cache first; if available, return cached results. Otherwise, query the database, update the cache with fresh results, and return the data.

FROM: security-agent
TO: audit-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Execute simultaneous scans for open ports and SSL certificate validation. Exclude internal-only services from scan scope.

FROM: monitoring-agent
TO: verification-agent
